title: Turn off @everyone on this board

posts.author: adinap (Adina Pierce)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to disable users being able to tag @everyone on this board?

image554×392 83.4 KB

We have 300+ users on our boards, and we don’t want people to use this option.

I disabled this option in permissions, but that doesn’t cover what I need

image534×380 70 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t think it’s a current setting, but I think it would be great! Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum

posts.author: Karmon (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml: Yeah, I was wondering the same, seems like a pretty basic control to have, especially for larger teams. I’ll check out the feature requests board too, definitely feels like something worth pushing for.
